directive_work.directive_title: Split curmudgeon discovery vs verification cycles
directive_work.directive_status_action: Marked DIRECTIVE-20260514-002 status=completed (additive edit per DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE exception), completed_at=2026-05-16T05:39:05.451Z, completed_by_run=tinker-2026-05-16T05-28, prop_id_authored=PROP-038.
directive_work.empirical_findings_headline: Across 34 high-cycle WINs (≥5 cycles, 954 holes): ~27% of holes are explicit carry-forwards (re-flags of unpatched prior-cycle holes); ~2% are explicit patch-introduced artifacts; combined wasted ~30%. Top-5 mean combined-wasted 33.7% (matches directive's 17-35% framing). Dominant pattern is cadence-race (category e), not patch artifact (category c).
directive_work.design_headline: Phase 1 deploys dome-curmudgeon-verify (Sonnet, 4h cadence offset 1h, narrow gate: class=verification + ≤2 minor prior holes + patches landed). Main curmudgeon (Opus) sheds gate-passing items only. Mirrors PROP-034 exactly. Phase 2 conditionally adds bounded cycle-gate. Hard constraint preserved: carry-forward audit signal kept via verify-mode Sonnet still re-flagging unpatched prior holes.

findings.summary: DIRECTIVE-20260514-002 executed end-to-end in one run. PROP-038 authored, analysis baseline written, directive marked completed.

Empirical baseline reframes the directive's narrative: carry-forwards (cadence race) dominate, not patch artifacts. PROP-038 design accommodates: Sonnet verify-mode preserves the carry-forward audit signal at lower cost.
findings.detail: Operator-supplied 35% patch-artifact figure on WIN-067 corresponds in my methodology to 25% carry + 13% explicit artifact = 38% combined. Same magnitude, different categorical split. Both metrics support the same conclusion: ~1/3 of high-cycle-WIN Opus cycles is verification-class work.

findings.summary: Directive task_3 Q5 references PROP-019 as curmudgeon dispatch optimization. PROP-019 is actually curmudgeon-fingerprint-compare-fix. The intended reference is PROP-021. Treated PROP-021 as the relevant prior-art; documented in PROP-038 context_verification.directive_reference_check.

Root partition at 100% (/dev/nvme0n1p1 9.5G/9.6G). Project footprint within bounds: /tmp/edit-clone 530MB (fresh, <2h), /tmp/kev-repo 127MB (cross-project from KEV-analysis run). System image /usr 6.1GB + /var 2.5GB dominates. Standing empowerment 24h-stale-clone removal does NOT apply (everything fresh). No action required; operator may want to monitor disk pressure across all scheduled agents.
